description: Unified authentication modes for public deployment and company intranet deployment.

local.purpose: Local development and early public beta.

public_password.purpose: Public internet deployment with normal login.

public_oidc.purpose: Public internet deployment through OAuth/OIDC provider.

intranet_header.purpose: Company intranet deployment behind trusted gateway/portal.

intranet_oidc.purpose: Company intranet deployment through enterprise OIDC.

intranet_saml.purpose: Company intranet deployment through enterprise SAML.

rbac_rule: External identity proves who the user is; InfoWatchtower roles decide what the user can do.
